ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the individual */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the individual */,
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the religion of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the individual */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nationality of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "income_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income range of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Current address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the individual */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_religion_id FOREIGN KEY ("religion_id") REFERENCES religion ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicity ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_range_id") REFERENCES income_ranges ("income_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicity" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., Caucasian, Asian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religion" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion (e.g., Christianity, Islam) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "individual_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual in the relationship */,
  "individual_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of relationship */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship started */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  "relationship_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_2") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_1") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_relationship_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_type_id") REFERENCES relationship_types ("relationship_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_types" (
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type (e.g., Parent, Sibling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social network connection */,
  "individual_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual in the network */,
  "individual_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual in the network */,
  "network_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of network connection */,
  "network_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the network connection started */,
  "network_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the network connection ended (if applicable) */,
  "network_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the network connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the connection was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_networks_network_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_type_id") REFERENCES network_types ("network_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_networks_individual_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_2") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_networks_individual_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id_1") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_types" (
  "network_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network type */,
  "network_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the network type (e.g., Friend, Colleague) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the community */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Approximate population size of the community */,
  "community_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the community */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the community was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_community_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community membership */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the individual joined the community */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the individual left the community (if applicable) */,
  "membership_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_community_memberships_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_community_memberships_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality (e.g., American, Turkish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Single, Married) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Doctor, Teacher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_ranges" (
  "income_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income range */,
  "income_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the income range (e.g., 0-30k, 30k-60k) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_range_id")
)
